steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The passage compares snowpack behavior at two elevations: at lower elevations, snowpack was deepest in early March.

The second sentence shifts to higher elevations—a contrasting condition with different results (mid-March instead).

A transition is needed that signals this opposition between the two cases.

steps.title: Match the transition to the contrast
steps.content: On the other hand introduces a contrasting condition, the appropriate transition for comparing behavior at different elevations. The other three signal clarification, exemplification, or summary—not contrast. That matches choice C — C is correct.
